description:
Comprehensive PDF management and editing solution for enhanced productivity.

Soda PDF is a complete solution for creating, editing, converting, and securing PDF documents. With both a powerful desktop application and online tools, it streamlines document management and enhances productivity.
- Refreshed UI  Soda PDF Desktop 15 introduces a new visual style from the ground up: updated iconography, refined layout and spacing, and a cleaner editing experience throughout.
- Next-generation backend  The application has been migrated to a modernized technical architecture, resulting in improved performance, greater stability, and a stronger foundation for future feature development.
- Improved compatibility  Soda PDF Desktop 15 is fully compatible with your existing Soda PDF documents, workflows, and account.
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements.
